description: Create a new Workflow in iDempiere named 'Project_Initiation_WF' for the Project table (C_Project). The workflow must have exactly three nodes named 'WF_Start', 'WF_Review', and 'WF_Approved'. Configure the transitions so that the process flows strictly from Start -> Review -> Approved. Ensure 'WF_Start' is set as the Start Node of the workflow.
